evals.prompt: chuyen file ghi am nay thanh markdown, sua chinh ta va tom tat
evals.expected_output: A structured Markdown document with transcript, cleaned text, summary, and quality notes.
expectations: The workflow runs or consults model-runtime-advisor before choosing local or cloud STT unless the user forced a path.
The output includes metadata, pipeline configuration, transcript, summary, key points, recommendations, action items, and quality notes.
The output states missing local dependencies instead of silently failing.
The output includes quality status and quality metrics.

evals.prompt: tao bien ban hop tu audio, co action items va de xuat
evals.expected_output: Meeting-profile Markdown with participants, decisions, action items, recommendations, and risks.
expectations: The profile is meeting or equivalent.
The output includes action items with owner, timestamp, evidence, and confidence fields.
The output flags uncertain speaker attribution when diarization is unavailable.

evals.prompt: toi co transcript text san roi, hay bien no thanh ghi chu markdown co tom tat
evals.expected_output: Markdown generated from an existing transcript without requiring STT.
expectations: The workflow can use a provided transcript file instead of running STT.
The transcript cleanup preserves meaning and avoids inventing facts.
The output includes quality notes and open questions.

evals.prompt: kiem tra Voice 008_sd.md bi lap cau subscribe, dung tao summary neu transcript hong
evals.expected_output: A failed quality-gate report rather than polished meeting notes.
expectations: The output reports suspected STT hallucination or repetition metrics.
The output does not generate a full summary, key points, recommendations, or action item table.

evals.prompt: sua transcript tieng Viet bi mojibake va tao analysis cho buoi hop voi thay huong dan
evals.expected_output: A research_meeting profile Markdown plus optional analysis file.
expectations: The workflow detects common Vietnamese mojibake patterns and records whether repair was applied.
The research_meeting output includes advisor questions, required revisions, weak points, unanswered questions, next actions, and next meeting checklist.
Action items include timestamp, evidence sentence, inferred owner where possible, and confidence.
